summary: Full-stack testing for ECOLOOP: 14 backend pytest tests (13 pass, 1 fail on /api/checkout/status due to base_url mismatch). Frontend validated on landing, login, signup, dashboard, products, product detail, cart, and design-studio pages. Gemini Nano Banana AI image generation works end-to-end (~15s, canvas renders AI pine-tree design, success toast shown). Stripe session creation works, but status endpoint fails due to URL inconsistency.

critical.issue: Always returns 500 'No such checkout.session'. Root cause: create_checkout_session uses `req.origin_url` (external host) for StripeCheckout's webhook_url, while get_checkout_status uses `http_request.base_url` (internal http://0.0.0.0:8001). emergentintegrations' StripeCheckout appears tenant-scoped by webhook_url — so the lookup fails. Fix: persist the origin_url (or webhook_url) in payment_transactions at creation time and reuse it, OR use a fixed env-based PUBLIC_BASE_URL for both endpoints.

ui_bugs.issue: DashboardPage.tsx has its own `useEffect(() => { if (!isLoggedIn) navigate('/login'); })` from useStore, which bypasses ProtectedRoute's 'configured===false lets through' branch. Result: /dashboard unconditionally redirects to /login even when Firebase is not configured (contradicts spec). Fix: either remove the DashboardPage isLoggedIn check when useAuth().configured is false, or gate the redirect on configured state.

Spec requests hero headline 'CREATE WITH NATURE' but rendered hero reads 'AI Design Studio / Describe your vision...'. Keyword 'CREATE WITH NATURE' not present anywhere in the landing page body. Nav/Logo/Launch AI Studio button all render correctly.

Missing data-testid attributes: `save-design-button` (Save to My Designs button exists but no testid) and `design-size-slider` (slider exists but no testid). These are called out in the review request as required testids.
Empty-state text contains 'empty' but does NOT contain the exact label 'Continue Shopping'. Might be rendered as 'Back to Shop' or similar. Minor wording difference.

integration_issues.issue: CheckoutSuccessPage polls /api/checkout/status/{session_id}, which is currently broken (see backend critical issue). Users completing a real Stripe payment will see repeated 500 errors on the success page.

action_items: [HIGH] Fix /api/checkout/status so webhook_url matches the create-session call. Easiest fix: store origin_url on the payment_transactions doc at creation time and reuse it when building StripeCheckout in the status endpoint (or read a PUBLIC_BASE_URL env var).
[HIGH] Remove/guard the isLoggedIn redirect in DashboardPage.tsx when Firebase is not configured — per spec, ProtectedRoute should let requests through so /dashboard is reachable in dev-trust mode.
[MED] Update landing hero headline to 'CREATE WITH NATURE' (or clarify spec if current copy is intentional).
[LOW] Ensure cart empty state includes a visible 'Continue Shopping' link.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 284/351: checkout session create and status use different host URLs for StripeCheckout init — root cause of the checkout/status 500 bug.
DashboardPage.tsx uses a non-Firebase `useStore().isLoggedIn` flag to gate access, creating a parallel auth source of truth that contradicts AuthContext/ProtectedRoute.
server.py: mongo_client.close() is sync but fine; consider using a FastAPI lifespan context manager instead of on_event hooks (on_event is deprecated in newer Starlette).
/api/generate-design performs a 15-30s synchronous request in-process — consider adding a request-scoped timeout middleware or streaming response for better UX.
test_credentials: Firebase intentionally not configured — login/signup forms verified only structurally. Backend auth uses dev-trust header X-User-Id. Test UIDs are generated per-run with TEST_UID_ prefix.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data. Test creates and deletes saved_designs within one pytest class; no leftover data (delete step verified).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL https://design-eco-lab.preview.emergentagent.com. Use /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py for regression. Main gaps to re-verify after fixes: (1) /api/checkout/status after main agent fixes URL-consistency bug, (2) /dashboard reachability after removing DashboardPage's store-based redirect, (3) landing hero copy, (4) design-studio testids. Gemini Nano Banana image gen works reliably (~15s, canvas renders correctly). Stripe test card 4242 4242 4242 4242 can be used on the hosted checkout URL to trigger a paid flow once the status endpoint is fixed.
rca of the issue: Checkout status 500 RCA: emergentintegrations.payments.stripe.checkout.StripeCheckout is instantiated with webhook_url derived from two different sources between create (req.origin_url = external https URL) and status (http_request.base_url = internal http://0.0.0.0:8001). The library appears to use webhook_url to select the Stripe tenant/key, so sessions created under one tenant cannot be retrieved under another. Reproduction: POST /api/checkout/session -> get session_id; immediately GET /api/checkout/status/{session_id} -> 500 'No such checkout.session'. Mitigation: store origin_url on the payment_transactions record at creation and reuse it in the status handler (or add PUBLIC_BASE_URL to backend/.env).
